tutor_narration_student_facing: "In the last lesson, you built a rectangle with 4 square tiles in each row and 5 rows. You checked it and saw that the area was 20 square tiles. Today you will look at that same rectangle again — and learn two different ways to write what you already know about it. The equal sign is the key. Let's look at what it really means."
